live_halftime_snapshot.lesson: Live market inflation after a huge SAS scoring burst did not produce enough second-half continuation. Final landed 213 despite strong shot quality and three-point efficiency.

deep_postmortem.core_read: Game 4 punished the pregame over because the scoring environment was efficient but not possession-rich enough. Both teams finished with strong three-point outcomes and acceptable shot quality, but 27 combined turnovers and late-game close-score compression held the total to 213.
over_loss_diagnosis: Over 216.5 needed 217 but final landed 213, missing by 3.5.
SAS created the cleaner rim-or-3 profile at 75.58%, but rim finishing was only 10/22 and above-break threes were 9/30.
NYK had excellent efficiency, especially 15/32 from three and 58.89 TS%, but 15 turnovers limited volume.
Rebound parity at 48-48 prevented either side from creating a major possession-extension edge.
The halftime/live market showed 228.5, but the game state was vulnerable to pace compression after the frontloaded burst.
what_worked: The model correctly identified offensive quality: SAS shot quality 0.56 and NYK shot quality 0.54.
The Wembanyama rebound gravity call was strong: 13 rebounds, 19 chances, 9 contested, 43.9 minutes.
The live-flow framework correctly flagged inflated live total risk after the 228.5 market print.
what_failed: The pregame total model needed a stronger close-game pace brake around 216.5+ totals.
The model overweighted made-three continuation and underweighted turnover drain.
The model treated high shot quality as enough to clear the total without requiring a confirmed possession edge.
The model did not sufficiently penalize NYK turnover profile against SAS pressure.

series_carry_forward: Do not auto-bet over in the 216.5 band unless model mean clears by 4+ AND possession forecast supports it.
Separate pace-driven overs from efficiency-driven overs. Game 4 was efficiency-supported but possession-constrained.
Monitor Wembanyama rebound lines aggressively if below his current chance profile.
Treat Towns rebound props as minutes/foul-risk dependent; 10 rebounds on 25.8 minutes shows ceiling if minutes normalize.
NYK live overs require turnover suppression confirmation; otherwise points can stall despite hot shooting.
priority_markets_for_game5: Hart rebounds if role stays 32+ minutes
Full-game total only after pace and possession model confirmation
Team totals only after comparing shot-quality projection against turnover drag
avoid_rules: Avoid buying live overs purely because first-half scoring spikes.
Avoid totals if turnover projection exceeds 26 combined without compensating foul or OREB runway.
Avoid pregame over if market rises without a possession-count upgrade.
